content: Always include MCP-related videos when surfacing Claude content — they almost always belong together.
When a topic mentions agents, also pull in tool-use and evals — those are the foundational concepts.
Prefer Anthropic Engineering and modelcontextprotocol.io over generic news roundups for protocol-level details.
Simon Willison's blog is high-signal for practical LLM observations — keep it weighted high.
Current focus: the agent loop pattern, eval design, and MCP server authoring — building toward a personal toolkit.
Track how Claude Code is being adopted in real codebases — case studies > announcements.
Vibecoding stack: Claude Code + Vite + Tailwind + Supabase. Look for content that builds on this combo specifically.
Avoid React Native / Swift mobile content unless it intersects directly with AI agents or Claude.
